sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Infosys Shares Rise After Three Sessions Of Decline
feed.summary: Infosys shares saw a 2% rise to Rs 1,178 on the NSE, breaking a three-session decline that included its worst weekly sell-off in six years. This rebound follows pressure from weak Q4 earnings, subdued FY27 guidance, and subsequent target price cuts from various brokerages. Despite investor sentiment being impacted by the company's refusal to share AI-revenue numbers, analysts maintain a largely positive outlook with an average 12-month target price implying a 26% upside.

feed.title: Nvidia vs. Netflix: Wall Street Says This Large Tech Stock Will Make You Richer Over the Next 12 Months
feed.summary: This article analyzes Nvidia and Netflix as investment opportunities, noting both companies have faced recent challenges despite historical success. Wall Street analysts are bullish on both stocks, with Nvidia expected to see significant growth from its new Vera Rubin platform and Netflix poised for continued success due to its streaming dominance, strong engagement metrics, and strategic pricing power, despite a recent failed acquisition attempt and soft earnings outlook. Nvidia is projected to offer higher upside according to analyst price targets.

feed.title: ORIX (NYSE: IX) to transfer ORIX Bank to Daiwa Next Bank for ¥370B
feed.summary: ORIX Corporation announced its plan to transfer all shares of its consolidated subsidiary, ORIX Bank, to Daiwa Next Bank for ¥370 billion. This strategic move aims to improve ORIX's capital efficiency and expand its asset management business, aligning with its 2035 targets. The transaction is expected to generate significant income and extraordinary gains for ORIX, with completion scheduled by October 2026.

feed.title: Domino’s Misses Expectations. It’s Counting on More Stores to Spur Growth.
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza missed investor expectations, primarily due to lower-than-anticipated same-store sales. The company is now focusing on opening new stores to drive growth, a strategy that has raised concerns among investors. This quarter's results confirmed those worries as U.S. same-store sales increased only slightly while international sales declined due to weaker consumer spending.

feed.title: IonQ–SkyWater (NASDAQ: SKYT) deal looms over 2026 director elections and auditor vote
feed.summary: SkyWater Technology (SKYT) is holding its 2026 Annual Meeting to elect nine directors and ratify KPMG LLP as its independent auditor, with the meeting's occurrence contingent on the pending merger with IonQ. If the merger is completed before June 10, 2026, the meeting will not be held as SkyWater will become a wholly owned subsidiary of IonQ. The proxy statement also details executive compensation for 2025, including retention bonuses tied to the merger, and outlines the company's corporate governance, risk oversight, and stockholder information.

feed.title: L3Harris Secures $1B DOW Investment for Missile Production, R&D
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies has secured a $1 billion investment from the Department of War for its Missile Solutions (MSL) business. This funding will support the expansion and modernization of solid rocket motor production facilities and advance national security technologies. The investment, provided through a convertible preferred security, aligns with the Pentagon’s Acquisition Transformation Strategy and precedes a planned second-half 2026 IPO for the MSL business.
